info.title: Aha! API
info.description: Aha! REST API for product management. Create and manage products, features, releases, ideas, goals, initiatives, epics, requirements, to-dos, pages, users, and more. Supports OAuth2, API key, and Basic Auth. Rate limited to 300 req/min, 20 req/sec per account. Pagination via page/per_page parameters. Response customization via fields parameter.
